message:
test(tui): add 37 snapshot/golden tests for dashboard screens (bd-xzt.4.3)

Add test_snapshot_golden.rs covering all 7 screens across narrow/wide
terminal dimensions, healthy/pressured/degraded data states, and color
mode variants. Tests use SHA-256 hash-based change detection plus
structural content assertions for key elements (badges, section headers,
layout classes). Verifies render determinism, dimensional adaptation,
pressure state transitions, and accessibility badge text labels.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
